description: At night in the crypt, voices seep from the stone -- the echoes of past sacrifices asking if they were truly willing.
notification_text: The crypt breathes. Voices seep from stone: 'Willing.' They are asking you a question.

description: After finding the ghost letters, at night in the manor, the apparition of Silas Maren appears briefly.
notification_text: A translucent figure in the manor hall. Silas Maren, thirty years dead, looking at you with eyes that say: 'Take care of them.' Then gone.

description: At night in Thornwood while carrying the heirloom compass, the needle spins and points downward into the roots.
notification_text: The compass needle spins, then points DOWN. Into the roots. Something below remembers the name on its back.

description: Between 2-4 AM, after the family truth is revealed, witness Old Maren communing with her dead son through the soil.
notification_text: Old Maren's hands buried in soil up to wrists. 'I know, Silas. I'm watching them. Both of them.'
